title: Tamil Nadu Polls: AIADMK to Contest 169 Seats, Check Full List of Constituencies Allotted to 7 Allies
description: The NDA has finalised its seat-sharing pact for the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, with AIADMK contesting 169 seats and BJP allocated 27 constituencies, including Mylapore, Coimbatore North, Madurai South, and Nagercoil, while PMK, AMMK, and TMC received the remaining seats.
